Plaintiff Academy of Art University, is present. Represented by Chris Vissialli
Attorney, Daniel Stern, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Marcus Hauser, is present.
Attorney, Ronald Kravitz, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem A.M. Young, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 303B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of MAY-02-2011 is vacated.
